task: Fix stale Active Selection map overlay after branch/runtime consolidation
root_cause: The map overlay only read the legacy mock selectedParcel object. Live top-search selections hydrate selectedParcelIntelligence, so real parcels that are not in mockParcels left the overlay in its no-selection state.

state_source_fixed.current: MapViewportPlaceholder prefers selectedParcelIntelligence, selectedParcelId, and latest parcel focus summary, with mock selectedParcel as fallback

cage_visibility_status.visual_adjustment: Selected parcel cage extrusion edge size increased from 1.8 to 2.6, translucent fill opacity increased from 0.13 to 0.18, and extrusion height increased from 7 to 10 for better SceneView readability.

validation.npm_run_build_webpack: passed on rerun after initial timeout
